changes: Renamed ToggleControl label from 'Display above content (overlay mode)' to 'Display over the content (overlay mode)'
Added spaceholderHeight state and headerRef ref
Added useEffect with ResizeObserver to measure header height when displayAboveContent is true
Changed outer wrapper className from 'flex flex-col gap-2 pt-8' to 'relative flex flex-col gap-2 mt-8'
Added editor-only spaceholder div after header-main-spacer that shows when displayAboveContent is true and spaceholderHeight > 0
Changed outer wrapper class from 'flex flex-col gap-2 pt-8' to 'relative flex flex-col gap-2 mt-8'

syncStatus.notes: Pre-existing structure difference warning at depth 1 (TSX uses displayContent conditional rendering vs PHP conditional rendering — not a new issue introduced by this change)

testPage.notes: No attribute schema changes; no new block variations added. Existing test page at https://ign.localhost/test-header/ remains valid.

fixesApplied.description: Renamed toggle label from 'Display above content (overlay mode)' to 'Display over the content (overlay mode)'
Changed pt-8 (padding-top) to mt-8 (margin-top) on outer wrapper in both TSX and PHP
Added 'relative' class to outer wrapper in both TSX and PHP to contain absolutely-positioned .header-main
Added editor-only spaceholder div with ResizeObserver-measured height to prevent block appender from overlapping header in overlay mode
